home.title: Vector
home.subtitle: Manage academics, finances, and daily life — all in one place.
home.heroSubtitle: Vector brings together academics, finances, and life skills into one calm, structured platform designed to empower you through every semester.
home.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to stay balanced through your academic journey
home.atlasDescription: Track courses, deadlines, and your mental state. Get visual signals when you need to recalibrate.
home.flowDescription: Log expenses, visualize spending patterns, and understand where your money goes each month.
home.kitDescription: Ready-made checklists for hostel life, exam prep, internships, and major life transitions.
home.whyChooseSubtitle: We believe in empowering students with tools that respect their time, privacy, and mental well-being.
home.benefit1: Your data stays yours — full privacy control
home.benefit4: Insights that actually help you grow
home.insightText: Your workload increased by 20% this week. Consider scheduling some rest time this weekend.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of students who are navigating life with clarity and confidence.

about.title: About Vector
about.subtitle: We're building the life management platform we wished we had as students — calm, structured, and genuinely helpful.
about.story1: In physics, a vector has both direction and magnitude — it tells you not just how strong something is, but where it's going.
about.story2: That's what we want to be for students: a guiding force that helps you understand where you are, where you're headed, and gives you the strength to get there.
about.story3: Student life is complex. Between academics, finances, mental health, and preparing for the future, it's easy to feel overwhelmed. Vector brings all of these together in one place, giving you clarity without adding to the noise.
about.coreValuesSubtitle: The principles that guide every decision we make
about.value1Desc: Like a vector, we provide clear direction through the complexities of student life.
about.value2Desc: Mental health and balance are at the core of everything we build.
about.value3Desc: Your data belongs to you. We never sell, share, or exploit your information.
about.value4Desc: Tools that help you take control, not apps that create dependency.
about.mission1Desc: Built by students who understand the struggle
about.globalDesc: Whether you're in a college hostel, living at home, or studying abroad, Vector adapts to your life. Available in English and Hindi, with more languages coming soon.

hiw.title: How Vector Works
hiw.subtitle: Three powerful modules working together to help you thrive
hiw.moduleSubtitle: Each module is designed to solve a specific challenge in student life
hiw.step1Desc: Sign up with email, phone, or Google. Your college email is optional.
hiw.step2Desc: Start with Atlas, Flow, Kit, or all three. Enable what you need.
hiw.step3Desc: Add courses, log expenses, or pick a kit. Takes just minutes to set up.
hiw.step4Desc: Receive gentle nudges and weekly summaries. Always explainable, never intrusive.
hiw.atlasFeature3: Visual signals: On Track / Needs Attention / Overloaded
hiw.kitFeature1: Curated readiness kits for every situation
hiw.kitFeature4: Smart recommendations based on your needs

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your data belongs to you. Here's how we protect it.
privacy.principle1Desc: Your academic records, finances, and personal reflections are yours alone. We never sell or share your data.
privacy.principle2Desc: We only collect what's necessary to make Vector work for you. Nothing more, nothing less.
privacy.principle3Desc: Industry-standard encryption protects your data in transit and at rest. Your privacy is our priority.
privacy.principle4Desc: No hidden tracking, no mystery algorithms. You can see exactly what we collect and why.
privacy.control1Desc: Download all your data in standard formats whenever you want.
privacy.control2Desc: Request complete data deletion. We remove everything, no backups kept.
privacy.control3Desc: Disable analytics, notifications, or any feature you're not comfortable with.
privacy.control4Desc: See when and how your data was accessed. Full audit trail available.
privacy.whatWeCollectDesc: We believe in transparency. Here's exactly what data Vector stores:
privacy.accountInfoDesc: Email, name, and optional phone for authentication and account recovery.
privacy.academicDataDesc: Courses, deadlines, and grades you choose to track in Atlas.
privacy.financialDataDesc: Expenses and transactions you log in Flow. We never see your bank details.
privacy.usagePatternsDesc: Anonymous analytics to improve Vector. Can be disabled in settings.
privacy.neverItem1: Bank account or credit card numbers
privacy.neverItem4: Data from other apps on your device
privacy.questionsDesc: We're happy to answer any questions about how we handle your data.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.formDesc: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.faq1Q: How long does it take to get a response?
contact.faq1A: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days. For urgent issues, reach out via Discord.
contact.faq2Q: I found a bug, what should I do?
contact.faq2A: Select 'Bug Report' in the subject dropdown and provide as much detail as possible. Screenshots help!
contact.faq3Q: Can I request a new feature?
contact.faq3A: Absolutely! We love hearing from users. Select 'Feature Request' and tell us your idea.
